Dark Spring Amulet

Once in a while, all incoming healing of the amulet wearer is increased by 50% for 5 sec. The unit also instantly restores 100000 health. In addition, the unit has a 50% chance to restore 100000 health to all allies in a small radius around them.

Requirements: 98-100
